text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Training can be so draining. 
Everyone looks exhausted…

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
If only I could give them something 
to help replenish their strength…

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps something sweet or a light snack… 
Although something filling could be good 
too… Hmmm…

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: …Oh, why not? I'll just make aaall of those!
